name: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp.
business: BriaCell is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing novel immunotherapies to transform cancer care, currently advancing its Bria-IMT targeted immunotherapy in combination with an immune checkpoint inhibitor for metastatic breast cancer.

exposures.sentence: The Company is currently advancing its Bria-IMT targeted immunotherapy in combination with an immune check point inhibitor (Retifanlimab) in a pivotal Phase 3 study in metastatic breast cancer.
